title: CT9 static tactic graph — Overload exhaustion
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT9 (Overload exhaustion). It requires the complete 19-node array in fixed source order from CT9.N01 through CT9.N19, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT9 (Overload exhaustion) tactic specification; must equal "CT9".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT9.N01, "Definition — charging map pi:D→P", in CT9 (Overload exhaustion); must equal "CT9.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT9.N01, "Definition — charging map pi:D→P"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT9.N01, "Definition — charging map pi:D→P"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT9.N02, "Definition — payer fibre F_p=pi^-1(p)", in CT9 (Overload exhaustion); must equal "CT9.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT9.N02, "Definition — payer fibre F_p=pi^-1(p)"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT9.N02, "Definition — payer fibre F_p=pi^-1(p)"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT9.N03, "Scope candidate — no finite labelling — scope audit", in CT9 (Overload exhaustion); must equal "CT9.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT9.N03, "Scope candidate — no finite labelling — scope audit"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT9.N03, "Scope candidate — no finite labelling — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT9.N04, "Payload record — P_9→10: label refinement needed"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT9.N05, "Lemma — P_9→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT9.N06, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.
